response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a skilled polyglot individual contributor with a solid distributed-systems background, but the gap between his profile and this CTO role is fundamental rather than incremental. He has never led an engineering organization, has no demonstrated experience managing teams of any size, and his entire 20-year career sits at the senior/staff IC level. His agentic AI exposure amounts to six months at a single employer with no evidence of production multi-agent systems at scale. The role demands executive leadership, board communication, fintech infrastructure depth, and a track record scaling teams from 10 to 30+, none of which appear in his history.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems and high-throughput backend experience (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic: millions of HTTP requests/second, low-latency DLang microservices)
Early hands-on exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, showing directional alignment with the space
Broad polyglot engineering range across stacks, paradigms, and deployment models (cloud, Kubernetes, embedded) demonstrating technical versatility
concerns: Zero team leadership experience: entire career is individual contributor at senior/staff level with no evidence of managing, hiring, or scaling engineering teams
Agentic AI experience is minimal and very recent (6 months, April–October 2025) with no evidence of production multi-agent systems operating under real financial or regulatory consequences
No fintech infrastructure depth (credit systems, payment flows, risk modeling, compliance across jurisdictions) and currently in a career gap since October 2025

key_factors.factor: No engineering leadership or team-scaling experience
Distributed systems and high-throughput backend background
